← Back to Halifax 2024
2024-12-18 Canada

Halifax 2024

For Christmas 2024, we flew to Halifax to spend the holidays with Rachel’s family at her grandma’s new house.

Christmas at Grandma’s house

Grandma’s new house just outside of Halifax

Caroline

Visiting Caroline (Rachel’s sister) was one of the first stops after we landed. We went out for dinner, and it was great to catch up.

Out for dinner with Caroline

Caroline’s roommate’s kitten

Caroline’s roommate’s kitten

The cat liked Sebastián

Doggie

We also met Grandma’s new dog, named “Doggie”.

Doggie

The dog also liked Sebastián

Visiting Halifax

Sebastián and Rachel took the ferry to Halifax and spent the day walking around.

On the ferry

In Halifax

Citadel Hill

Paella

Snow

There was a huge snowstorm while we were there.

There was a huge snowstorm while we were there

Sebastián and Jonathan

The ocean

Enjoying the snow

‘Skating’ on a pond behind the house

Time with Family

Lovely to have time with family.

Relaxing together

We made gingerbread houses

Helping Grandma unpack

Christmas Day

Christmas Day was all about giving gifts and enjoying everyone together.

Giving gifts

Giving gifts
